message:
Revert sync directory back to Beeper-Sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -8,13 +8,13 @@ pkill -f "beeper-message-sync" 2>/dev/null || true
 sleep 1
 
 echo "Clearing logs and state..."
-rm -rf ~/Dropbox/Message-Sync/logs/ ~/Dropbox/Message-Sync/state.json
-mkdir -p ~/Dropbox/Message-Sync/logs
+rm -rf ~/Dropbox/Beeper-Sync/logs/ ~/Dropbox/Beeper-Sync/state.json
+mkdir -p ~/Dropbox/Beeper-Sync/logs
 
 echo "Running backfill..."
 .build/release/beeper-message-sync backfill
 
 echo ""
 echo "Starting watch daemon..."
-nohup .build/release/beeper-message-sync watch >> ~/Dropbox/Message-Sync/daemon.log 2>&1 &
+nohup .build/release/beeper-message-sync watch >> ~/Dropbox/Beeper-Sync/daemon.log 2>&1 &
 echo "Daemon started (PID: $!)"
